jokes.text: I'm in bed, but I only rest half my brain at a time.
jokes.setup: Someone asks if Frankie is awake at night
jokes.punchline: She claims to only rest half her brain like a dolphin
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment for hyper-competent Frankie - absurd but delivered matter-of-factly

jokes.text: I am Jeffrey, best friend of dean.
jokes.setup: Someone pretending to be Jeff texting the Dean
jokes.punchline: Awkward broken English reveals it's clearly not Jeff
jokes.explanation: Sets up the running gag but not particularly clever on its own

jokes.text: Bro, I just secret that way with love. You know, my style. We keep loving in text, but then secret forever. Meow.
jokes.setup: Dean mentions Jeff acts different in texts vs real life
jokes.punchline: Completely nonsensical response ending with 'Meow'
jokes.explanation: Peak absurdity of the fake Jeff bit - 'secret forever. Meow' is wonderfully random

jokes.text: I had to remove my night cream, it's $200 an ounce.
jokes.setup: Jeff is angry about being woken up for emergency meeting
jokes.punchline: His main complaint is about expensive skincare routine
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jeff vanity moment - prioritizes appearance over emergency

jokes.text: I have a theory about this, Britta may be secretly twins.
jokes.setup: Someone asks why Britta is awake
jokes.punchline: Abed proposes completely random conspiracy theory
jokes.explanation: Classic Abed - random conspiracy theory delivered deadpan

jokes.text: Could a drunk person do this? [implied visual gag]
jokes.setup: Britta denies being drunk and asks if a drunk person could do something
jokes.punchline: Presumably does something that clearly indicates she's drunk
jokes.explanation: Classic setup but execution depends on visual we can't see

jokes.text: No, the unrelated, totally random combination of those four letters.
jokes.setup: Someone asks if KZBC is the TV station
jokes.punchline: Jeff sarcastically clarifies it's obviously the TV station
jokes.explanation: Standard Jeff sarcasm - competent but not exceptional

jokes.text: Because the population keeps growing, and no one here ever graduates.
jokes.setup: Discussion of Greendale's rising registration numbers
jokes.punchline: Dark truth that students never actually graduate
jokes.explanation: Sharp institutional critique delivered with Jeff's cynicism

jokes.text: Oh, get a boardroom.
jokes.setup: Annie and Frankie complimenting each other professionally
jokes.punchline: Twist on 'get a room' but for their professional chemistry
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay twist on common phrase

jokes.text: Nothing in particular, just overlapping clouds of many thousands and thousands of things.
jokes.setup: Asked if there's anything City College could smear them with
jokes.punchline: Poetically describes infinite potential scandals
jokes.explanation: Jeff's lyrical pessimism about Greendale's countless problems

jokes.text: There isn't a Brenda factor. / He says she's doing better. / Better than what? / Her thyroid condition!
jokes.setup: Mysterious Brenda referenced in email becomes source of confusion
jokes.punchline: Escalating confusion about who Brenda is and her condition
jokes.explanation: Good confusion escalation but becomes repetitive

jokes.text: The brotherhood of AV exists your petty factionalism. We serve only video, the one true queen, and her faithful consort, audio.
jokes.setup: Abed mentions having friends in AV at City College
jokes.punchline: Grandiose proclamation about AV department loyalty transcending schools
jokes.explanation: Perfect Abed - turns mundane AV work into epic mythology

jokes.text: No, most of us have achieved our maximum potential.
jokes.setup: Asked if AV guys could be bigger nerds
jokes.punchline: Deadpan admission they've peaked as nerds
jokes.explanation: Perfect deadpan self-awareness from Abed

jokes.text: A bunch of clocks with different times on them, a red phone, a big tabletop map with little Nazi tanks, and, or a Godzilla.
jokes.setup: Annie listing equipment needed for situation room
jokes.punchline: Goes from realistic to WWII war room to Godzilla movies
jokes.explanation: Great escalation from military serious to completely absurd

jokes.text: You know, it's the darndest thing, I think Britta somehow crapped in my pants too.
jokes.setup: Chang needs to leave the situation room
jokes.punchline: Impossible and gross explanation
jokes.explanation: Gross-out humor that feels lazy even for Chang

jokes.text: I mean I could declare it a. Cookie room! / There are no cookies. / There is a situation.
jokes.setup: Jeff dismisses the 'situation room' designation
jokes.punchline: Annie's literal response about cookies vs situation
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Annie's earnestness vs Jeff's cynicism

jokes.text: Found it. She was wandering around campus, without pants.
jokes.setup: Dean arrives saying he found something
jokes.punchline: Reveals Britta wandering pantsless (visual)
jokes.explanation: Physical comedy setup but relies on visual we can't assess

jokes.text: If the answer is Greendale, prepare to get boned.
jokes.setup: Serious attack ad about Greendale giving degrees to dogs
jokes.punchline: Crude pun on 'boned' (dogs like bones)
jokes.explanation: Weak pun that deflates the serious attack ad

jokes.text: I seem to recall, no.
jokes.setup: Asked directly if Greendale gave a degree to a dog
jokes.punchline: Vague, evasive non-answer that suggests guilt
jokes.explanation: Perfect Dean evasiveness - 'seem to recall' is hilariously non-committal

jokes.text: What I wanna know is, did a dog get a degree here, in any way that can be proven?
jokes.setup: Discussion about whether dog got degree
jokes.punchline: Jeff only cares about provable evidence, not truth
jokes.explanation: Perfect Jeff lawyer cynicism - truth vs provability distinction

jokes.text: So, how many seconds of that should I waste on truth, which is an artificial construct that rarely holds up in court, and has never changed the outcome of a fight.
jokes.setup: Jeff explaining his pragmatic approach
jokes.punchline: Cynical dismissal of truth as artificial construct
jokes.explanation: Peak Jeff cynicism - philosophically dark but perfectly in character

jokes.text: The Brenda paradox.
jokes.setup: Continuing confusion about mysterious Brenda
jokes.punchline: Jeff elevates it to philosophical paradox status
jokes.explanation: Callbacks the running gag with grandiose naming

jokes.text: I mean we've known this animal 30 seconds and she's already unreliable.
jokes.setup: Finding out dog was registered as different breed than ad claimed
jokes.punchline: Criticizing dog's 'reliability' based on breed paperwork
jokes.explanation: Good absurdist logic - treating breed mix-up as character flaw

jokes.text: So, why is he a pedophile? / Just demonstrating the formula.
jokes.setup: Jeff asks Chang to make attack ad
jokes.punchline: Chang immediately goes to pedophile accusation, Jeff treats it as educational
jokes.explanation: Dark satire of attack ad tactics - treats horrible accusation as formula

jokes.text: And maybe she barks just a little bit more, at black mailmen.
jokes.setup: Jeff listing ways to attack the dog's character
jokes.punchline: Suggests dog is racist based on barking patterns
jokes.explanation: Dark escalation of attack ad absurdity - dog racism allegation

jokes.text: But first, why don't you go get a bunch of coffee, drink all of it, then go get some more and bring it back here.
jokes.setup: Chang offers to spray paint Banksy-style dog stencils
jokes.punchline: Jeff sends him on impossible coffee errand to get rid of him
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection - pretends to take Chang seriously while dismissing him

jokes.text: No. No. Bad!
jokes.setup: Jeff suggesting they might bury evidence
jokes.punchline: Annie scolds Jeff like he's a dog (in episode about dog)
jokes.explanation: Excellent thematic callback - treating Jeff like the dog they're discussing

jokes.text: I say I go to City College with a camera, shoot a really gross porno movie on their campus and put it online. / Fine. / Cool. / Wait, what?
jokes.setup: Chang proposes outrageous revenge plan
jokes.punchline: Jeff casually agrees, Chang realizes how crazy his own idea was
jokes.explanation: Good beat structure - Chang's own surprise at Jeff's agreement

jokes.text: It's only my style to be secret, please bring me five can of olive. / Five cans? / But don't believe me if I say I don't like. I'm just pretending I hate olives.
jokes.setup: Continuation of fake Jeff texting pattern
jokes.punchline: Bizarre olive obsession with preemptive explanation of his fake hatred
jokes.explanation: Escalates running gag with specific absurd details about olive preferences

jokes.text: It's only my style to be secret, please bring me five can of olive.
jokes.setup: Dean resistant to bringing olives again
jokes.punchline: Fake Jeff's broken English request for five cans
jokes.explanation: Good continuation of both running gags - the olive obsession and the fake Jeff's broken English.

jokes.text: In fact, I kinda hope they do. / Well, why is that? / I don't know. They all treat me like I'm a joke. But if a dog got a degree, that means we're all a joke.
jokes.setup: Chang admitting he hopes the dog degree story is true
jokes.punchline: Wants everyone to be devalued so his own worthlessness feels normal
jokes.explanation: Surprisingly deep Chang moment - wants shared worthlessness over personal inadequacy

jokes.text: I was like 40. / I never really listened to music, when I was growing up. I was in my own world, but one day at work, I heard this sound.
jokes.setup: Discussing being into Natalie is Freezing at different ages
jokes.punchline: Frankie was 40 when into teen band, then overshares her isolated childhood
jokes.explanation: Good character building - Frankie's awkward oversharing about lonely past

jokes.text: Hope is pouting in advance. Hope is faith's richer, bitchier sister. Hope is the deformed addict bound incest monster offspring of entitlement and fear.
jokes.setup: Annie asks what Frankie hopes is true
jokes.punchline: Increasingly elaborate and dark metaphors for why hope is bad
jokes.explanation: Exceptional escalating metaphors - each description gets more elaborate and dark. Peak Frankie characterization

jokes.text: I assume Change thinks I sound like distant explosions and crying babies, you know, he's unstable, right?
jokes.setup: Discussing how different characters might perceive her voice
jokes.punchline: Matter-of-fact assessment of Chang's mental state with specific audio metaphor
jokes.explanation: Good Frankie moment - clinical assessment with vivid metaphor

jokes.text: See what hope does? / Screw you, Frankie!
jokes.setup: Annie gets excited finding transcript then crushed it proves the dog story
jokes.punchline: Frankie uses Annie's emotional rollercoaster to prove her anti-hope philosophy
jokes.explanation: Perfect callback - Frankie proves her philosophy right in real time

jokes.text: Victory. / You know, within the context of Greendale.
jokes.setup: Annie celebrates finding no degree in dog's file
jokes.punchline: Frankie qualifies the victory as only meaningful at Greendale
jokes.explanation: Good deflation of Annie's enthusiasm with Frankie's realism

jokes.text: Ruffles stole cookies from a Girl Scout, impersonated a lobster, has had 27 children with five different fathers, and, according to one local doctor, has worms.
jokes.setup: Attack ad against the dog escalating accusations
jokes.punchline: Mix of plausible (stealing cookies) and ridiculous (impersonated lobster) charges
jokes.explanation: Good escalation mixing realistic and absurd charges against dog

jokes.text: I originally wanted the voice over to be a James roll Jones impersonator, but the James bater impersonator turned out pretty good.
jokes.setup: Chang explaining his creative choices for the attack ad
jokes.punchline: Mispronounces 'Earl Jones' as 'roll Jones' and 'Darth Vader' as 'bater'
jokes.explanation: Typical Chang malapropism but not particularly creative

jokes.text: Jackpot, relative to Greendale. / My God, look at the course load, this dog was an animal.
jokes.setup: Finding evidence about the dog's academic record
jokes.punchline: Jeff calls dog 'an animal' as compliment about work ethic
jokes.explanation: Clever play on words - 'animal' as both literal description and work ethic praise

jokes.text: Eat crap Ruffles, and not just your own.
jokes.setup: Jeff celebrating victory over proving dog didn't graduate
jokes.punchline: Unnecessarily crude insult directed at dog
jokes.explanation: Weak gross-out humor that feels forced

jokes.text: And dragging this dog's name through the mud? That's worse than dishonest. That's evil! / Evil? / I'll cop to silly.
jokes.setup: Annie condemning their attack on dog as evil
jokes.punchline: Jeff admits to 'silly' but not evil
jokes.explanation: Good character contrast - Annie's moral outrage vs Jeff's casual admission

jokes.text: Somethings are silly and evil, like candy cigarettes. And remember when Flava Flav had that reality show? / I don't own a TV.
jokes.setup: Annie listing things that are both silly and evil
jokes.punchline: Frankie's matter-of-fact response deflates the pop culture reference
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Frankie's disconnect from pop culture

jokes.text: If it ends with you yelling at me for not sleeping, that's not a story, that's a German art film.
jokes.setup: Jeff describing the circular nature of the night's events
jokes.punchline: Compares pointless narrative to pretentious German cinema
jokes.explanation: Smart meta-commentary on narrative structure with cultural reference

jokes.text: I am a female student being physically overpowered by a male teacher. / Damn it!
jokes.setup: Jeff trying to physically stop Annie from leaving
jokes.punchline: Annie points out how bad the optics look, Jeff realizes the problem
jokes.explanation: Good awareness of problematic dynamics but handled delicately

jokes.text: Hope and $1.49 will get you a candy bar. / Buck 79. Are you serious? / Jesus!
jokes.setup: Annie using old expression about hope and candy bar prices
jokes.punchline: Jeff corrects the price, showing how outdated the saying is
jokes.explanation: Good deflation of dramatic moment with mundane price correction

jokes.text: You could say yeah, that and $.50 could get you a candy bar, or that and a quarter could get you a phone call. It was easy to be unimpressed back then. I mean it was, literally, cheaper.
jokes.setup: Jeff explaining old dismissive expressions
jokes.punchline: Realizes cynicism was cheaper when everything cost less
jokes.explanation: Clever observation about how inflation affects dismissive expressions

jokes.text: She came really close to getting a degree, which means two things. She's an exceptional dog, and Greendale really needs to get its together.
jokes.setup: Positive ad about dog's academic performance
jokes.punchline: Backhanded compliment to both dog and school
jokes.explanation: Good spin that admits problems while staying positive

jokes.text: You hoped. / I hoped and it worked. / Hope points.
jokes.setup: Annie claims she knew friends wouldn't attack dog
jokes.punchline: Forced to admit she hoped, then celebrates hope working against Frankie's philosophy
jokes.explanation: Good payoff to hope vs cynicism theme with Annie's small victory

jokes.text: This is pornography? / Doy. / You're the only actor. / So?
jokes.setup: Discovering Chang's 'porno' revenge video
jokes.punchline: Chang doesn't understand why solo performance isn't pornographic
jokes.explanation: Pays off earlier setup but relies on cringe more than cleverness

jokes.text: Okay genius, but the title is Chang does Greendale, oh wait. / Reshoots.
jokes.setup: Jeff pointing out flaw in Chang's plan
jokes.punchline: Chang immediately decides to reshoot rather than think it through
jokes.explanation: Good Chang moment showing his impulsive problem-solving

jokes.text: Why don't I bring you some olives tomorrow, Jeffrey? / I am not Jeffrey! / I am not the dean!
jokes.setup: Dean trying to be supportive despite confusion
jokes.punchline: Takashi's increasingly desperate attempts to clarify identity
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of the running gag with increasing desperation

jokes.text: I often think about that night. Such a small event, but ultimately the moment that would lead me to becoming loban. Highest the leader of the Yakuza.
jokes.setup: Takashi reflecting on the night's events
jokes.punchline: Claims this minor mix-up led to him becoming a Yakuza leader
jokes.explanation: Excellent escalation - takes minor phone mix-up to epic criminal origin story
